title: Reading the Treble Clef
description: Learn the letter names of the lines and spaces specifically for the Treble Clef (G Clef).

lessons.title: Every Good Boy Deserves Fudge
lessons.description: Learn the notes on the five lines of the Treble Clef.
lessons.prompt: Teach the notes on the lines of the Treble Clef: E, G, B, D, F. Explain common mnemonics like 'Every Good Boy Deserves Fudge'. Provide interactive exercises that present these line notes randomly and ask the user to play them on their keyboard.

lessons.title: FACE in the Space
lessons.description: Learn the notes in the four spaces of the Treble Clef.
lessons.prompt: Teach the notes in the spaces of the Treble Clef: F, A, C, E. Explain the mnemonic 'FACE'. Provide interactive exercises that present space notes randomly for the user to play.

lessons.title: Treble Clef Mastery
lessons.prompt: Combine Treble Clef line and space notes. Provide exercises with melodic fragments spanning from E4 to F5. Focus on step-wise motion and small skips.
